General.Name: Dingdang Health Tech Grp Ltd
General.Description: Dingdang Health Technology Group Ltd. provides digital healthcare services in the People's Republic of China. The company offers online medical consultation through online and supplementary services; chronic diseases management; and health portfolio management and DOT medication adherence services. It provides a range of health products through offline retail and online direct sales channels Dingdang Health Technology Group Ltd. was incorporated in 2014 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.
